description: Perform a one-sample t-test on the 'len' variable from the Tooth Growth dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth.csv) against a test value of 20. The analysis must include both Student's and Wilcoxon rank tests, as well as the mean difference, effect size, confidence interval, and descriptives table. Include Shapiro-Wilk and Q-Q plot assumption checks. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/OneSampleTTest_ToothGrowth.omv.
